expectations.text: The output is valid prd.json with at least 5 user stories.
expectations.evidence:
{
  "project": "Task Statuses",
  "branchName": "task-statuses",
  "description": "Add task status tracking, editing, badges, and filtering.",
  "userStories": [
    {
      "id": "US-001",
      "title": "Add task status persistence with pending default",
      "description": "As a product team member, I want each task to persist a status value so that workflow progress is tracked reliably.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Tasks storage includes a status field with allowed values pending, in_progress, and done",
        "Existing tasks are backfilled or default to pending",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/db/migrations/*add-task-status*",
        "src/db/schema/tasks.*"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 1,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-002",
      "title": "Define shared task status model contract",
      "description": "As an engineer, I want one shared task-status type so that API handlers and UI components use consistent status values.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "A shared TaskStatus type or enum is defined and exported",
        "Task read/write paths use the shared TaskStatus contract",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/types/task.*",
        "src/models/task.*"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 2,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-003",
      "title": "Implement task status update operation",
      "description": "As a user, I want to update a task status from supported values so that I can keep task progress current.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "A backend action or endpoint updates task status by task id",
        "Invalid status values are rejected with a validation error",
        "Updated status is returned to callers",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/server/tasks/*",
        "src/api/tasks/*"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 3,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-004",
      "title": "Show task status badge on task cards",
      "description": "As a user, I want each task card to show a status badge so that I can scan progress quickly.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Task cards render a visible badge for pending, in progress, and done states",
        "Badge text updates when task status changes",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/components/task-card.*",
        "src/components/status-badge.*"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 4,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-005",
      "title": "Add status control in task list rows",
      "description": "As a user, I want to change status directly in the task list so that I can update progress without leaving the list.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Each task row includes a status control with pending, in progress, and done options",
        "Changing status triggers the status update operation and refreshes row state",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/components/task-list-row.*",
        "src/components/task-status-select.*"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 5,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-006",
      "title": "Filter task list by status",
      "description": "As a user, I want to filter tasks by status so that I can focus on pending, in-progress, or completed work.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Task list includes filter options All, Pending, In Progress, and Done",
        "Selecting a filter updates visible rows to matching statuses",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/components/task-list-filter.*",
        "src/pages/tasks/*"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 6,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    }
  ]
}

expectations.text: The stories separately cover schema, backend status updates, badge display, status controls, and filtering.
